name: Cedar / Amazon Verified Permissions — authorization inventory
description: Imports a Cedar authorization inventory into XORCISM's API Authorization Governance (/authz-governance): the policy store / Amazon Verified Permissions (AVP) as a Policy Decision Point (PDP) and its Cedar policies (permit/forbid; Cedar is deny-by-default by design), plus API gateways (PEP) that delegate to it. Cedar (https://www.cedarpolicy.com) is the open authorization language behind AWS Verified Permissions, evaluating Principal-Action-Resource-Context. Worker-safe & offline: pass `file` = an AVP `ListPolicies` export or an inventory JSON, or run with no config for the bundled sample. Normalized to authz_pdps / authz_gateways / authz_policies.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: An AVP ListPolicies export, or an inventory JSON {pdps,gateways,policies}. Omit for the bundled sample.
